summary: Global Market Data Provider Integration (Phase 4) - All tests passed. Backend: 12/12 tests (100%). Frontend: All critical flows working. Real prices from Twelve Data, Polygon, CoinGecko integrated successfully.

minor.issue: CoinGecko search results may not appear in mixed searches (e.g., 'BTC' returns Twelve Data results primarily). Works correctly for crypto analysis.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/assets/search?q=AAPL returns results with provider='twelve_data' and exchange info
Backend: GET /api/assets/search?q=BTC returns crypto results with provider field
Backend: GET /api/assets/search?q=EUR/USD returns forex results
Backend: GET /api/assets/search?q=toyota returns Toyota from multiple global exchanges (SET, XHAN, JPX, NYSE, OTC)
Backend: GET /api/assets/search?q=samsung returns Samsung from KRX, LSE with provider info
Backend: POST /api/analysis/start with AAPL - REAL price $250.12, source: twelve_data+generated_candles
Backend: POST /api/analysis/start with EUR/USD forex - real rate from twelve_data
Backend: POST /api/analysis/start with BTC crypto - REAL price $72,466 from coingecko
Backend: POST /api/analysis/start - all 11 steps return 'complete' status
Backend: POST /api/analysis/start - report contains regime (strong bull, expansion) and manipulation (score, risk_level)
Backend: POST /api/jarvis/chat - JARVIS responds with intelligent GPT-5.2 response
Backend: GET /api/analysis/history - returns saved analyses from MongoDB
Frontend: Login at /login with demo@aureos.com / Demo1234! works
Frontend: Navigate to /analysis page - loads correctly
Frontend: Search 'AAPL' - shows 15 results with NASDAQ exchange info
Frontend: Search 'toyota' - shows 17 results from multiple exchanges (SET, XHAN, JPX, NYSE)
Frontend: Select AAPL and run analysis - displays REAL price $250.12
Frontend: Price chart shows candlesticks with Support/Resistance levels
Frontend: All 11 pipeline steps show green checkmarks with data
Frontend: Regime Detection shows regime:strong bull, phase:expansion
Frontend: Manipulation Scan shows score:43, risk:moderate
Frontend: Analysis Results shows BUY 80.5% signal strength
Frontend: JARVIS copilot button present and clickable at bottom-right
critical_code_review_comments: Real market data integration working: Twelve Data for stocks/forex, CoinGecko for crypto, Polygon as backup
Global asset search returns results from multiple exchanges (NYSE, JPX, LSE, KRX, etc.)
Price validation confirms real data: AAPL ~$250, BTC ~$72,466, TM (Toyota) ~$210
Candle data supplemented with generated candles when real candles < 50 (expected behavior per spec)
All 11 analysis steps complete including Regime Detection and Manipulation Detection
JARVIS copilot powered by GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key
seed_data_creation: None required - existing demo user used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Global Market Data Provider Integration fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_global_data_providers.py. Real prices from: Twelve Data (stocks/forex), CoinGecko (crypto), Polygon (US stocks backup). Search returns results with provider and exchange fields. Analysis shows 11 complete steps including regime_detection and manipulation_detection. Rate limits: Twelve Data ~8/min, Polygon ~5/min, CoinGecko no key needed.

mocked_components.note: Candle data is supplemented with generated data when real candles < 50. Prices are REAL from providers.
supplemented: Candle data auto-generated when real candles insufficient for quality analysis

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No critical issues found. All Phase 4 features tested and working correctly.
